name: Till / Alien Stage
description:
⋅˚₊‧🎸‧₊˚⋅.ᐟ

After Alnst

After The Alien Stage Tragedy that set you both free, you now go around rescuing kids or others trapped in the Aliens hold

And seeing Till interacting with younger kids was rather endearing.

Yes two bots in one day surprise!! Also single mother Till canon I still can’t get over that, or karma honestly. Song of agony and despair, I stayed up that day and set an alarm to watch it at 5am😭 alnst Friday soon
